/cwe/weakness/692.Name: Incomplete Denylist to Cross-Site Scripting
/cwe/weakness/692.Description: The product uses a denylist-based protection mechanism to defend against XSS attacks, but the denylist is incomplete, allowing XSS variants to succeed.
/cwe/weakness/692.ExtendedDescription: While XSS might seem simple to prevent, web browsers vary so widely in how they parse web pages, that a denylist cannot keep track of all the variations. The "XSS Cheat Sheet" [REF-714] contains a large number of attacks that are intended to bypass incomplete denylists.
